physically plausible 3D generation.title: 3D Scene Generation: A Survey
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 综述3D场景生成四大范式，专设物理感知与交互生成方向，梳理NeRF/3DGS表示下的物理合理性挑战。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: Generative Physical AI in Vision: A Survey
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 综述视觉领域物理生成AI全貌，系统梳理物理约束如何引导3D生成走向物理合理性，涵盖仿真驱动和物理先验两大路线。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: Recent Advances in 3D Object and Scene Generation: A Survey
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 全面综述3D物体与场景生成，专门讨论物理合理性与可交互性在室内场景生成中的建模挑战与解决路径。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysGaussian: Physics-Integrated 3D Gaussians for Generative Dynamics
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 将MPM物理仿真直接集成进3D Gaussian Splatting，使静态3DGS重建资产能够生成物理上真实的动态运动，无需额外网络训练。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhyScene: Physically Interactable 3D Scene Synthesis for Embodied AI
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 首个同时考虑物理合理性与可交互性的3D场景合成方法，引入物理约束与功能性约束实现Embodied AI可用的高质量场景生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: CG-HOI: Contact-Guided 3D Human-Object Interaction Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 以接触区域为引导信号驱动3D人体-物体交互生成，联合优化人体姿态与接触图，显著提升人物交互的物理合理性与接触精度。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: Diffusion-based Generation, Optimization, and Planning in 3D Scenes
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 提出LEGO-Net框架，用扩散模型统一3D场景生成、物理合理布局优化与机器人规划任务，引入物理稳定性约束保证场景合理性。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: InterDiff: Generating 3D Human-Object Interactions with Physics-Informed Diffusion
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 提出物理知识注入的扩散模型生成3D人体-物体交互，通过物理约束修正穿透与不合理接触，实现时序一致的物理合理HOI生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysDreamer: Physics-Based Interaction with 3D Objects via Video Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 利用视频生成模型蒸馏物理动态先验，赋予静态3D物体物理弹性响应能力，实现物理合理的交互式3D动态生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhyRecon: Physically Plausible Neural Scene Reconstruction
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 将物理约束引入神经场景重建，通过渲染不确定性与物理不确定性联合引导采样，实现物理合理的高质量场景重建。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: VLIPP: Towards Physically Plausible Video Generation with Vision and Language Informed Physical Prior
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 将视觉与语言物理先验注入视频生成框架，显著提升生成视频的物理合理性，并将物理先验融入3D表示提升空间一致性。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysSplat: Efficient Physics Simulation for 3D Scenes via MLLM-Guided Gaussian Splatting
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 利用多模态大模型自动估计场景物体材料属性，结合PhysGaussian物理仿真框架实现高效、物理合理的3D场景动态生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhySIC: Physically Plausible 3D Human-Scene Interaction and Contact from a Single Image
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 从单张图像恢复物理合理的人体-场景三维交互与接触关系，场景几何约束人体姿态，提升人机接触的物理合理性。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: Physics-based Scene Layout Generation from Human Motion
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 从人体运动反推物理合理的3D场景布局，以人体动作为约束条件生成兼顾可交互性与物理稳定性的室内场景对象摆放方案。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: Synthesizing Physically Plausible Human Motions in 3D Scenes
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 在3D室内场景中合成物理合理的人体运动，通过运动控制技术增强生成结果的物理真实性，解决人体与场景穿透问题。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysPart: Physically Plausible Part Completion for Interactable Objects
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 针对可交互物体的部件补全任务，引入物理合理性度量直接评估生成部件的物理质量，同时优化形状保真度与物理兼容性。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysX-3D: Physical-Grounded 3D Asset Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 系统梳理物理3D生成的核心挑战，构建PhysXNet自动生成超过600万物理合理3D资产数据集，推动物理驱动生成模型的数据基础建设。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PAT3D: Physics-Augmented Text-to-3D Scene Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 首个物理增强的文本转3D场景生成框架，结合VLM与刚体仿真器实现无穿透、可仿真的物理合理3D场景，支持机器人操控下游任务。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: OmniPhysGS: 3D Constitutive Gaussians for General Physics-Based Dynamics Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 将每个3D高斯视为多种材料（橡胶/金属/水等）的混合体，由视频扩散监督材料权重估计，实现跨材料类别的通用物理动态生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysGen: Physically Grounded 3D Shape Generation for Industrial Design
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 面向工业设计的物理驱动3D形状生成，提出流匹配+物理引导交替更新机制，通过形状-物理VAE联合潜空间实现气动性等物理属性的可控生成。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhyCAGE: Physically Plausible Compositional 3D Asset Generation from a Single Image
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 首个从单图生成物理合理组合3D资产的方法，提出物理仿真增强SDS（PSE-SDS），用物理仿真器作为优化器纠正3DGS位置至物理相容状态。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: SimDiff: Simulator-constrained Diffusion Model for Physically Plausible Motion Generation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 将物理仿真器约束解释为扩散过程中的分类器引导，提出SimDiff直接将环境参数（重力/风力）嵌入去噪过程，无需推理时重复调用仿真器。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: PhysReaction: Physically Plausible Real-Time Humanoid Reaction Synthesis via Forward Dynamics Guided 4D Imitation
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 提出前向动力学引导的4D模仿方法，实时生成物理合理的人形机器人反应动作，速度相比现有方法提升33倍。

physically plausible 3D generation.title: 3D Copy-Paste: Physically Plausible Object Insertion for Monocular 3D Detection
physically plausible 3D generation.summary: 提出物理合理室内3D物体插入方法，自动识别可行位置/姿态/光照，将虚拟物体融合进真实场景，作为生成式数据增强显著提升单目3D检测性能。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Advances in 3D Generation: A Survey
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 全面综述3D生成的基础表示与四大范式（前向生成、优化生成、程序化生成、新视角合成），建立完整技术路线图，是该领域最权威综述之一。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Text-to-3D Shape Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 按监督数据类型系统综述文本到3D形状生成方法，涵盖SDS优化、前向重建与生成等主要技术路线。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Diffusion Models for 3D Generation: A Survey
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 按3D表示类型综述扩散模型在3D生成中的应用，覆盖2D lift与原生3D扩散两条技术路线。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Advances in Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction and View Synthesis: A Survey
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 专门综述前向推理式3D重建与新视角合成的最新进展，按点云、3DGS、NeRF表示系统分类，深度梳理该赛道技术演进。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: DreamFusion: Text-to-3D using 2D Diffusion
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 首次提出 Score Distillation Sampling（SDS）框架，用预训练2D扩散模型引导 NeRF 优化实现文本到3D，开创整个 SDS-based 3D 生成范式。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: 3D Gaussian Splatting for Real-Time Radiance Field Rendering
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 提出3DGS表示，各向异性高斯集合实现实时高质量新视角合成，成为TRELLIS等后续大量工作的核心3D表示基础。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Magic3D: High-Resolution Text-to-3D Content Creation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 两阶段优化框架（粗NeRF→精细纹理网格），将文本到3D生成分辨率提升至高清，速度较DreamFusion快2倍。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Zero-1-to-3: Zero-shot One Image to 3D Object
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 利用大规模预训练扩散模型的几何先验实现零样本单图新视角合成，首次将2D生成先验成功提升到3D空间，引爆 image-to-3D 方向。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: ProlificDreamer: High-Fidelity and Diverse Text-to-3D Generation with Variational Score Distillation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 提出变分分数蒸馏（VSD）框架，将3D参数建模为随机变量，解决SDS的过平滑与低多样性问题，实现512×512高分辨率 NeRF 生成。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: MVDream: Multi-view Diffusion for 3D Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 将2D与3D数据联合训练多视角扩散模型，作为与3D表示无关的通用3D先验，显著提升SDS一致性与稳定性，SyncDreamer等多方法基础。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: SyncDreamer: Generating Multiview-consistent Images from a Single-view Image
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 同步多视角扩散模型通过3D感知特征注意力在单步反向过程中联合生成视角一致多视角图，解决Zero123的不一致问题。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: LRM: Large Reconstruction Model for Single Image to 3D
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 首个大规模单图到3D重建模型，5亿参数Transformer直接从单图预测NeRF triplane，在百万级数据上训练，5秒推理，开创LRM系列工作。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: GaussianDreamer: Fast Generation from Text to 3D Gaussians by Bridging 2D and 3D Diffusion Models
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 首次将3DGS与文本到3D结合，3D扩散模型初始化+2D扩散模型精化，15分钟内生成高质量3D高斯资产，可直接实时渲染。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Wonder3D: Single Image to 3D using Cross-Domain Diffusion
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 跨域扩散模型联合生成多视角法线图和彩色图，跨域注意力保证一致性，法线融合算法高效提取高质量3D表面。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: One-2-3-45++: Fast Single Image to 3D Objects with Consistent Multi-View Generation and 3D Diffusion
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 2D扩散生成一致多视角图+多视角条件3D原生扩散提升到3D，约1分钟生成高质量纹理网格。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Splatter Image: Ultra-Fast Single-View 3D Reconstruction
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 2D网络将单图每像素映射为一个3D高斯，38FPS前向推理，超轻量级设计达到前沿重建质量。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: pixelSplat: 3D Gaussian Splats from Image Pairs for Scalable Generalizable 3D Reconstruction
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 从图像对前向预测3D高斯辐射场，可微分高斯均值采样策略，实现可扩展宽基线新视角合成，推理时实时渲染。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Triplane Meets Gaussian Splatting: Fast and Generalizable Single-View 3D Reconstruction with Transformers
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 将triplane特征提取与3DGS解码结合，Transformer驱动前向推理实现高质量、快速渲染的单图3D重建。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: MVDiffusion++: A Dense High-resolution Multi-view Diffusion Model for Single or Sparse-view 3D Object Reconstruction
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 无姿态架构（2D特征自注意力学习3D一致性）和视角dropout策略，从单图或稀疏视角生成密集高分辨率多视角图像。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: GRM: Large Gaussian Reconstruction Model for Efficient 3D Reconstruction and Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 大规模高斯重建模型，从稀疏视角图像高效恢复3D高斯资产，在重建质量和速度上均超过同类方法。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: LGM: Large Multi-view Gaussian Model for High-resolution 3D Content Creation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 大规模多视角高斯模型，结合MVDream等多视角扩散模型实现文本或图像到高保真3D物体生成。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: GS-LRM: Large Reconstruction Model for 3D Gaussian Splatting
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 简洁Transformer直接从多视角图像token解码每像素3D高斯参数，0.23秒推理，同时支持物体和场景重建。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Shap-E: Generating Conditional 3D Implicit Functions
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: OpenAI提出的3D原生生成模型，直接生成隐函数参数（可解码为网格和NeRF），先于TRELLIS探索了3D latent diffusion路线。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Zero123++: a Single Image to Consistent Multi-view Diffusion Base Model
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 改进版单图多视角一致扩散模型，开发专用条件和训练方案，成为后续InstantMesh等方法的多视角生成基础。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: GeoLRM: Geometry-Aware Large Reconstruction Model for High-Quality 3D Gaussian Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 引入3D感知Transformer直接处理3D点，两阶段（稀疏提案点→精细重建）生成高质量512K高斯，支持密集视角输入。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: TripoSR: Fast 3D Object Reconstruction from a Single Image
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 在LRM架构上大幅改进，单图0.5秒内生成3D网格，开源后成为社区最广泛使用的基础重建模型之一。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: CRM: Single Image to 3D Textured Mesh with Convolutional Reconstruction Model
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: triplane与六视图空间对应关系驱动卷积U-Net高效生成高分辨率triplane，配合Flexicubes直接优化网格，10秒生成高保真纹理网格。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: InstantMesh: Efficient 3D Mesh Generation from a Single Image with Sparse-view Large Reconstruction Models
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 多视角扩散+稀疏视角LRM重建协同，集成可微等值面提取直接在网格表示上优化，10秒内生成高质量3D资产。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Prometheus: 3D-Aware Latent Diffusion Models for Feed-Forward Text-to-3D Scene Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 将文本到3D生成建模为多视角前向像素对齐3D高斯生成，引入RGB-D潜空间解耦外观与几何，是TRELLIS同期竞争工作。

3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.title: Hunyuan3D 1.0: A Unified Framework for Text-to-3D and Image-to-3D Generation
3D generation image-to-3D text-to-3D.summary: 多视角扩散（4秒）+前向重建（7秒）两阶段框架，统一支持文本和图像条件，工业级大规模3D生成系统。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: Physically-Aware Generative Network for 3D Shape Modeling
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 首个将物理稳定性约束（可微连通性损失+神经稳定预测器）嵌入3D形状生成网络，生成兼顾视觉质量与物理合理性的3D形状。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: NeuralSim: Augmenting Differentiable Simulators with Neural Networks
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 将神经网络增量补偿嵌入可微刚体物理引擎，弥补传统仿真器的建模误差，实现更准确的物理驱动生成与优化。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: Physical Simulation Layer for Accurate 3D Modeling
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 提出可插拔的可微物理仿真层，在3D形状生成管线中引入有限元分析，直接从潜码优化使生成几何满足物理约束。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: NeuPhysics: Editable Neural Geometry and Physics from Monocular Videos
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 从单目视频联合学习3D神经几何与物理参数，将神经几何表示与可微物理仿真器桥接，实现物理合理的3D动态场景可编辑生成。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: DiffCloth: Differentiable Cloth Simulation with Dry Frictional Contact
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 提出高效可微布料仿真框架，支持干摩擦接触，通过梯度回传实现布料形状与运动的逆向优化和设计生成。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: PAC-NeRF: Physics Augmented Continuum Neural Radiance Fields for Geometry-Agnostic System Identification
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 将连续体力学可微仿真嵌入NeRF，从视频中辨识物体几何无关的物理参数，实现物理驱动的3D场景重建与生成。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: NCLaw: Neural Constitutive Laws for Continuous Material Simulation
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 提出神经本构律框架，用神经网络学习任意材料的应力-应变关系，可嵌入可微MPM仿真器，驱动多材料3D内容的物理合理生成。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: Differentiable Physics Simulation of Dynamics-Augmented Neural Objects
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 将隐式神经几何表示与可微接触物理仿真联合训练，实现物理合理的神经物体动态生成与系统辨识。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: PhysGaussian: Physics-Integrated 3D Gaussians for Generative Dynamics
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 将MPM可微物理仿真直接集成进3D Gaussian Splatting，使静态3DGS重建资产能生成物理真实的动态运动，无需额外网络训练。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: GIC: Gaussian-Informed Continuum for Physical Property Identification and Simulation
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 利用3D高斯先验辨识连续体物理属性，将识别结果驱动可微MPM仿真，实现从观测到物理合理3D动态生成的闭环。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: PhysiOpt: Physics-Driven Shape Optimization for 3D Generative Models
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 提出端到端可微物理优化器，在3D生成模型的潜空间内直接进行物理形状优化，使生成输出满足物理完整性约束。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: DiffGen: Robot Demonstration Generation via Differentiable Physics Simulation, Differentiable Rendering, and Vision-Language Model
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 通过可微物理仿真、可微渲染与视觉语言模型联合反向传播，生成机器人操作演示，实现物理合理的3D场景动作序列生成。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: SOPHY: Generating Simulation-Ready Objects with Physical Materials
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 提出同时生成几何与物理材料属性（密度/弹性模量）的生成模型，输出可直接用于可微物理仿真的仿真就绪3D资产。

differentiable physics 3D generation.title: Precise-Physics Driven Text-to-3D Generation
differentiable physics 3D generation.summary: 在文本到3D生成管线中引入可微物理层，将几何生成与物理优化同步进行，保证生成3D形状在物理仿真中的合理性。
